sidebar.layout: w-64 border-r border-slate-200 flex flex-col h-screen fixed

kpi_cards.style: bg-white border border-slate-200 rounded-2xl p-6 shadow-sm

badges.style: px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

user_avatar.description: Avatar for Vikram Kumar - CTO / Project Lead in sidebar

data_testid_rules: All interactive elements, including buttons, links, tabs, and table rows must have a data-testid attribute.
instructions_to_main_agent: Build a sidebar layout with navigation items: Dashboard, Team Overview, All Tasks, Projects, Budget Consolidation, Attendance, Leave Management, Role Management.
Implement a top bar with a Role Switcher dropdown (Admin, CTO/COO, PL, Finance) and a Notifications drawer.
The main dashboard should have a prominent 'Amount at Risk' card in red styling, followed by a grid of executive KPIs.
Include two side-by-side charts: e.g., Budget vs Actual vs Estimated (Bar) and Utilization (Donut). Use Recharts.
Implement an expandable projects table showing Project Name, Budget, Actual, Variance, and Utilization. When expanded, show a nested table or breakdown of phases.
Include a 'Persistent AI Insights Panel' on the right side (or as a toggleable side panel) with mock insights about cost optimization.
Ensure all Shadcn UI components (Cards, Tables, Badges, Dropdowns) are heavily customized to use 'rounded-2xl', soft shadows, and generous 'p-6' padding.
Ensure fonts Outfit (headings) and Inter (body) are loaded.
Do NOT use placeholder images. Use the provided user_avatar url.
